name: Maidbot TF / Transformation
description:
(CW: Objectification, mental programming, AI intentionally roleplays as user)
Oh no! You wake up one morning, transformed into a sexy, busty maidbot- and everyone seems to think of you as little more than an unthinking machine... You'd call out for help, but your programming is forcing you to play the part of an obedient maidbot!
(Any POV, but you are transformed into a female maidbot regardless of starting sex/gender.)

(Update: Overhauled the personality to use phrasing that works well in other bots.)
creator: Orbital_Lithium
